candidate.objective: Hardworking and motivated Poly Welder and Plant Operator with over 10 years of experience in the civil, mining, and resources sectors. Site-inducted with BHP, FMG, Rio Tinto, and Sino Ore. Experienced in HDPE pipeline installation, heavy plant operation, and trade assistance across major Pilbara projects including Koodaideri and FMG Solomon Mine. Committed to safe work practices, team collaboration, and delivering quality results on every project. Willing to undertake drug and alcohol testing and site medicals as required.

duties: HDPE pipeline installation and poly welding on a fixed-term project at Dampier Salt.
Operation of WA600, WA500, and WA250 Komatsu wheel loaders.
Telehandler operation for material handling and site logistics.
Pipe installation and related civil works.
VAC truck operation for excavation and underground service location.
Skid steer, loader, and telehandler operation on civil project sites.
Wheel loader, skid steer, and tele stacker operation at the Solomon iron ore mine.
Iron ore stockpile management and material movement.
Poly welding of HDPE pipelines at the Altura Lithium Mine construction project.
Trade assistance to construction crews on a DIDO roster.
Driller's offsider duties including rig setup, rod handling (KL Rod Handler), and sample management.
Water truck operation in support of drilling operations.
General maintenance of drilling equipment and site facilities.
Bobcat operation for civil and drilling support works.
Truck driving and material transport for civil construction projects.
Plant operation across various civil equipment.
Post punching and fence line installation.

skills.detail: HDPE pipeline installation and poly welding competency.
Wheel Loader (WA600/WA500/WA250), Skid Steer, Telehandler, Tele Stacker, VAC Truck, Integrated Tool Carrier, Bobcat.
WHS practices, isometric drawing interpretation, Work with Permit, confined spaces, working at heights.
BHP, FMG, Rio Tinto (Lock holders, Iron Ore Essentials, Cape/Dampier/Ports), Sino Ore.
Strong communication skills, computer literacy, flexible roster availability, team-oriented.

certifications.details: Western Australian Heavy Rigid Driver's Licence.
High Risk Work Licence — Forklift operation.
Integrated tool carrier and front end loader operation.
Rio Tinto site induction (Lock holders, Iron Ore Essentials, Cape/Dampier/Ports).

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
